name: GR4J Model Calibration and Evaluation Workflow
description: A linear workflow to calibrate the GR4J hydrological model using observed data and evaluate its performance.

tasks.name: Get GR4J Model Parameters
tasks.description: Retrieve the parameter structure, default values, and bounds for the GR4J model.
tasks.expected_output: JSON object containing parameter names, default values, and feasible ranges for GR4J.

tasks.name: Prepare Hydrological Input Data
tasks.description: Process and format observed rainfall, potential evapotranspiration, and streamflow data for model input.
tasks.expected_output: Cleaned and aligned time series data in model-compatible format.

tasks.name: Calibrate GR4J Model
tasks.description: Optimize GR4J parameters to minimize the difference between simulated and observed streamflow.
tasks.expected_output: Optimal parameter set and corresponding simulated streamflow time series.

tasks.name: Evaluate Model Performance
tasks.description: Compute statistical metrics (e.g., NSE, RMSE, KGE) to assess model accuracy.
tasks.expected_output: Dictionary of performance metrics quantifying model fit.

metadata.clarified_intent: 用户希望对GR4J水文模型进行参数率定，并对其模拟结果进行评估。
